column2: # ---- 6-panel plots, each with its own numbered axes ----
# helper: one nicely labeled panel per site
coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims, expand = FALSE) +
# build the six panels (each panel has its own x/y numbers)
panel_plots <- lapply(site_list, panel_one_site, lims = lims, breaks_n = 6)
"EPA Continuous (FEM daily avg) vs EPA FRM (24hr) — by site",
p_epa_fem_vs_frm <- gridExtra::arrangeGrob(grobs = panel_plots, ncol = 3, top = title_grob)
